sentences.english: It rings at six thirty every morning and I always want five more minutes.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 6시 30분에 울리고 항상 5분만 더 자고 싶어요.

sentences.english: Sometimes I press snooze three or four times.
Then I have to rush to get ready for school.
sentences.korean: 그러면 학교 갈 준비를 서둘러야 해요.

sentences.english: One day I want to wake up naturally, without any alarm.
sentences.korean: 언젠가 알람 없이 자연스럽게 일어나고 싶어요.
